Interface IEdgeConnectivityRule

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply information about, modify and manage edge-edge connectivity rules.

[Guid("F290D9E2-58E5-11D2-AB26-000000000000")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IEdgeConnectivityRule : IConnectivityRule, IRule
